title: sour velvety vietnamese wrap
description: A quick and tangy weeknight wrap featuring a ginger cordial reduction, served in a ti-leaf wrap for a refreshing and healthy meal. This dish is perfect for a light dinner or snack
instructions: Heat 1 tsp of veggie oil in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add 1 tsp of tapioca starch and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add 2 tbsp of ginger cordial and 1 tbsp of fish sauce. Cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add 2 tbsp of coconut water and cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
While the reduction is cooking, heat 1 tsp of veggie oil in a pan over medium heat and fry the chopped vegetables (cucumber, carrots, radish, and green chili) until slightly tender.
Add the chopped cilantro and mint to the pan and stir to combine.
To assemble the wraps, place a cooked vegetable mixture onto a ti-leaf wrap, followed by a spoonful of the ginger cordial reduction.
Add a sprinkle of salt and pepper to taste.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients and serve hot.
